expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets SDK/API-visible outcomes and turns them into Phase 4a scenario shapes with observable verification leaves, e.g. “Window Title — edit via double-click … Observe the Workstation window title … Title matches the clicked report’s context/name” and “Loading Indicator — single loader … Only one loading indicator is shown.” It also cites fixture evidence that these outcomes were missed in Phase 4a (BCIN-7733, BCIN-7668).

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md anchors to the Phase 4a contract (“subcategory → scenario → atomic steps → observable verification leaves”) and provides examples in that structure. It also claims Phase 4a alignment explicitly: “Met: The required remedy is expressed as Phase 4a subcategory-only scenarios with atomic steps and observable verification leaves.” execution_notes.md likewise states it verified the Phase 4a contract and produced Phase 4a-aligned scenario shapes.
